verses.latin_vulgate: Hi sunt ergo principes familiarum, et genealogia eorum, qui ascenderunt mecum in regno Artaxerxis regis de Babylone.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֛לֶּה רָאשֵׁ֥י אֲבֹתֵיהֶ֖ם וְהִתְיַחְשָׂ֑ם הָעֹלִ֣ים עִמִּ֗י בְּמַלְכ֛וּת אַרְתַּחְשַׁ֥סְתְּא הַמֶּ֖לֶךְ מִבָּבֶֽל׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Now these are the chief of families, and the genealogy of them, who came up with me from Babylon in the reign of Artaxerxes the king.
verses.finnish_biblia: Nämät ovat niiden isäin päämiehet, ja heidän polvilukunsa, jotka läksivät minun kanssani Babelista kuningas Artahsastan hallitessa:
verses.king_james: These are now the chief of their fathers, and this is the genealogy of them that went up with me from Babylon, in the reign of Artaxerxes the king.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Phinees, Gersom. De filiis Ithamar, Daniel. De filiis David, Hattus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֤י פִֽינְחָס֙ גֵּֽרְשֹׁ֔ם {ס} מִבְּנֵ֥י אִיתָמָ֖ר דָּנִיֵּ֑אל {ס} מִבְּנֵ֥י דָוִ֖יד חַטּֽוּשׁ׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Phinees, Gersom. Of the sons of Ithamar, Daniel. Of the sons of David, Hattus.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pinehaan pojista, Gersom; Itamarin pojista, Daniel; Davidin pojista, Hattus;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Phinehas; Gershom: of the sons of Ithamar; Daniel: of the sons of David; Hattush.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Secheniæ, filiis Pharos, Zacharias : et cum eo numerati sunt viri centum quinquaginta.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֣י שְׁכַנְיָ֔ה {ס} מִבְּנֵ֥י פַרְעֹ֖שׁ זְכַרְיָ֑ה וְעִמּ֛וֹ הִתְיַחֵ֥שׂ לִזְכָרִ֖ים מֵאָ֥ה וַחֲמִשִּֽׁים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Sechenias, the son of Pharos, Zacharias, and with him were numbered a hundred and fifty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sekanian pojista, Paroksen lapsista, Sakaria, ja hänen kanssansa luettu sata ja viisikymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Shechaniah, of the sons of Pharosh; Zechariah: and with him were reckoned by genealogy of the males an hundred and fifty.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Phahath Moab, Elioënai filius Zarehe, et cum eo ducenti viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵי֙ פַּחַ֣ת מוֹאָ֔ב אֶלְיְהֽוֹעֵינַ֖י בֶּן־זְרַֽחְיָ֑ה וְעִמּ֖וֹ מָאתַ֥יִם הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Phahath Moab, Eleoenai the son of Zareha, and with him two hundred men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Pahatmoabin pojista, Eljoenai Serahian poika, ja hänen kanssansa kaksisataa miestä;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Pahath–moab; Elihoenai the son of Zerahiah, and with him two hundred males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Secheniæ, filius Ezechiel, et cum eo trecenti viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֥י שְׁכַנְיָ֖ה בֶּן־יַחֲזִיאֵ֑ל וְעִמּ֕וֹ שְׁלֹ֥שׁ מֵא֖וֹת הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Sechenias, the son of Ezechiel, and with him three hundred men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sekanian pojista, Jehasielin poika, ja hänen kanssansa kolmesataa miestä;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Shechaniah; the son of Jahaziel, and with him three hundred males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Adan, Abed filius Jonathan, et cum eo quinquaginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י עָדִ֔ין עֶ֖בֶד בֶּן־יוֹנָתָ֑ן וְעִמּ֖וֹ חֲמִשִּׁ֥ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Adan, Abed the son of Jonathan, and with him fifty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Adinin pojista, Ebed Jonatanin poika, ja hänen kanssansa viisikymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: Of the sons also of Adin; Ebed the son of Jonathan, and with him fifty males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Alam, Isaias filius Athaliæ, et cum eo septuaginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י עֵילָ֔ם יְשַֽׁעְיָ֖ה בֶּן־עֲתַלְיָ֑ה וְעִמּ֖וֹ שִׁבְעִ֥ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Alam, Isaias the son of Athalias, and with him seventy men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Elamin pojista, Jesaia Atalian poika, ja hänen kanssansa seitsemänkymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Elam; Jeshaiah the son of Athaliah, and with him seventy males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Saphatiæ, Zebedia filius Michaël, et cum eo octoginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י שְׁפַטְיָ֔ה זְבַדְיָ֖ה בֶּן־מִֽיכָאֵ֑ל וְעִמּ֖וֹ שְׁמֹנִ֥ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Saphatia: Zebodia the son of Michael, and with him eighty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sephatian pojista, Sebadia Mikaelin poika, ja hänen kanssansa kahdeksankymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Shephatiah; Zebadiah the son of Michael, and with him fourscore males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Joab, Obedia filius Jahiel, et cum eo ducenti decem et octo viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִבְּנֵ֣י יוֹאָ֔ב עֹבַדְיָ֖ה בֶּן־יְחִיאֵ֑ל וְעִמּ֕וֹ מָאתַ֛יִם וּשְׁמֹנָ֥ה עָשָׂ֖ר הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Joab, Obedia the son of Jahiel, and with him two hundred and eighteen men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Joabin pojista, Obadia Jehielin poika ja hänen kanssansa kaksisataa ja kahdeksantoistakymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: Of the sons of Joab; Obadiah the son of Jehiel, and with him two hundred and eighteen males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Selomith, filius Josphiæ, et cum eo centum sexaginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֥י שְׁלוֹמִ֖ית בֶּן־יוֹסִפְיָ֑ה וְעִמּ֕וֹ מֵאָ֥ה וְשִׁשִּׁ֖ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Selomith, the son of Josphia, and with him a hundred and sixty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Selomitin pojista, Josiphian poika, ja hänen kanssansa sata ja kuusikymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Shelomith; the son of Josiphiah, and with him an hundred and threescore males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Bebai, Zacharias filius Bebai, et cum eo viginti octo viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י בֵבַ֔י זְכַרְיָ֖ה בֶּן־בֵּבָ֑י וְעִמּ֕וֹ עֶשְׂרִ֥ים וּשְׁמֹנָ֖ה הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Bebai, Zacharias the son of Bebai: and with him eight and twenty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Bebain pojista, Sakaria Bebain poika, ja hänen kanssansa kahdeksankolmattakymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Bebai; Zechariah the son of Bebai, and with him twenty and eight males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Azgad, Johanan filius Eccetan, et cum eo centum et decem viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י עַזְגָּ֔ד יוֹחָנָ֖ן בֶּן־הַקָּטָ֑ן וְעִמּ֕וֹ מֵאָ֥ה וַעֲשָׂרָ֖ה הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Azgad, Joanan the son of Eccetan, and with him a hundred and ten men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Asgadin pojista, Johanan nuorin poika, ja hänen kanssansa sata ja kymmenen miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the sons of Azgad; Johanan the son of Hakkatan, and with him an hundred and ten males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filiis Adonicam, qui erant novissimi : et hæc nomina eorum : Elipheleth, et Jehiel, et Samaias, et cum eis sexaginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֣י אֲדֹנִיקָם֮ אַחֲרֹנִים֒ וְאֵ֣לֶּה שְׁמוֹתָ֔ם אֱלִיפֶ֖לֶט יְעִיאֵ֣ל וּֽשְׁמַעְיָ֑ה וְעִמָּהֶ֖ם שִׁשִּׁ֥ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Adonicam, who were the last: and these are their names: Eliphelet, and Jehiel, and Samaias, and with them sixty men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Adonikamin viimeisistä pojista, joiden nimet ovat: Eliphelet, Jehiel ja Semaja, ja heidän kanssansa kuusikymmentä miestä;
verses.king_james: And of the last sons of Adonikam, whose names are these, Eliphelet, Jeiel, and Shemaiah, and with them threescore males.

verses.latin_vulgate: De filii Begui, Uthai et Zachur, et cum eis septuaginta viri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִבְּנֵ֥י בִגְוַ֖י עוּתַ֣י (וזבוד) [וְזַכּ֑וּר] וְעִמּ֖וֹ שִׁבְעִ֥ים הַזְּכָרִֽים׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Of the sons of Begui, Uthai and Zachur, and with them seventy men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Bigvain pojista, Utai ja Sabbud ja heidän kanssansa seitsemänkymmentä miestä.
verses.king_james: Of the sons also of Bigvai; Uthai, and Zabbud, and with them seventy males.

verses.latin_vulgate: Congregavi autem eos ad fluvium qui decurrit ad Ahava, et mansimus ibi tribus diebus : quæsivique in populo et in sacerdotibus de filiis Levi, et non inveni ibi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָֽאֶקְבְּצֵ֗ם אֶל־הַנָּהָר֙ הַבָּ֣א אֶֽל־אַהֲוָ֔א וַנַּחֲנֶ֥ה שָׁ֖ם יָמִ֣ים שְׁלֹשָׁ֑ה וָאָבִ֤ינָה בָעָם֙ וּבַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים וּמִבְּנֵ֥י לֵוִ֖י לֹא־מָצָ֥אתִי שָֽׁם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I gathered them together to the river, which runneth down to Ahava, and we stayed there three days: and I sought among the people and among the priests for the sons of Levi, and found none there.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä kokosin heidät sen virran tykö, joka tulee Ahavaan, ja oleskelimme siinä kolme päivää. Ja kuin minä visusti katselin kansan ja papit, en minä löytänyt yhtäkään Leviläistä.
verses.king_james: And I gathered them together to the river that runneth to Ahava; and there abode we in tents three days: and I viewed the people, and the priests, and found there none of the sons of Levi.

verses.latin_vulgate: Itaque misi Eliezer, et Ariel, et Semeiam, et Elnathan, et Jarib, et alterum Elnathan, et Nathan, et Zachariam, et Mosollam principes : et Jojarib, et Elnathan sapientes.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁלְחָ֡ה לֶאֱלִיעֶ֡זֶר לַאֲרִיאֵ֡ל לִֽ֠שְׁמַעְיָ֠ה וּלְאֶלְנָתָ֨ן וּלְיָרִ֜יב וּלְאֶלְנָתָ֧ן וּלְנָתָ֛ן וְלִזְכַרְיָ֥ה וְלִמְשֻׁלָּ֖ם רָאשִׁ֑ים וּלְיוֹיָרִ֥יב וּלְאֶלְנָתָ֖ן מְבִינִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: So I sent Eliezer, and Ariel, and Semeias, and Elnathan, and Jarib, and another Elnathan, and Nathan, and Zacharias, and Mosollam, chief men: and Joiarib, and Elnathan, wise men.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin minä lähetin Elieserin, Arielin, Semajan, Elnatanin, Jaribin, Elnatanin, Natanin, Sakarian ja Mesullamin, päämiehet, ja Jojaribin ja Elnatanin, opettajat;
verses.king_james: Then sent I for Eliezer, for Ariel, for Shemaiah, and for Elnathan, and for Jarib, and for Elnathan, and for Nathan, and for Zechariah, and for Meshullam, chief men; also for Joiarib, and for Elnathan, men of understanding.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et misi eos ad Eddo, qui est primus in Chasphiæ loco, et posui in ore eorum verba, quæ loquerentur ad Eddo, et fratres ejus Nathinæos in loco Chasphiæ, ut adducerent nobis ministros domus Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ואוצאה) [וָאֲצַוֶּ֤ה] אוֹתָם֙ עַל־אִדּ֣וֹ הָרֹ֔אשׁ בְּכָסִפְיָ֖א הַמָּק֑וֹם וָאָשִׂ֩ימָה֩ בְּפִיהֶ֨ם דְּבָרִ֜ים לְ֠דַבֵּ֠ר אֶל־אִדּ֨וֹ אָחִ֤יו (הנתונים) [הַנְּתִינִים֙] בְּכָסִפְיָ֣א הַמָּק֔וֹם לְהָֽבִיא־לָ֥נוּ מְשָׁרְתִ֖ים לְבֵ֥ית אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I sent them to Eddo, who is chief in the place of Chasphia, and I put in their mouth the words that they should speak to Eddo, and his brethren the Nathinites in the place of Chasphia, that they should bring us ministers of the house of our God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja lähetin ne Iddon tykö, joka oli päämies Kasiphian paikkakunnassa, tuomaan meille palvelioita Jumalamme huoneesen, ja minä panin heidän suuhunsa sanat, mitä heidän piti Iddolle puhuman ja hänen veljillensä Netinimeille Kasiphian paikkakunnassa.
verses.king_james: And I sent them with commandment unto Iddo the chief at the place Casiphia, and I told them what they should say unto Iddo, and to his brethren the Nethinims, at the place Casiphia, that they should bring unto us ministers for the house of our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et adduxerunt nobis per manum Dei nostri bonam super nos, virum doctissimum de filiis Moholi filii Levi, filii Israël, et Sarabiam et filios ejus et fratres ejus decem et octo,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֨יאּוּ לָ֜נוּ כְּיַד־אֱלֹהֵ֨ינוּ הַטּוֹבָ֤ה עָלֵ֙ינוּ֙ אִ֣ישׁ שֶׂ֔כֶל {ס} מִבְּנֵ֣י מַחְלִ֔י בֶּן־לֵוִ֖י בֶּן־יִשְׂרָאֵ֑ל וְשֵׁרֵ֥בְיָ֛ה וּבָנָ֥יו וְאֶחָ֖יו שְׁמֹנָ֥ה עָשָֽׂר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And by the good hand of our God upon us, they brought us a most learned man of the sons of Moholi the son of Levi the son of Israel, and Sarabias and his sons, and his brethren eighteen,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he toivat meille, Jumalamme hyvän käden jälkeen meidän ylitsemme, viisaan miehen, Mahelin pojista Levin pojan, Israelin pojan, ja Serebian hänen poikainsa ja veljeinsä kanssa, kahdeksantoistakymmentä;
verses.king_james: And by the good hand of our God upon us they brought us a man of understanding, of the sons of Mahli, the son of Levi, the son of Israel; and Sherebiah, with his sons and his brethren, eighteen;

verses.latin_vulgate: et Hasabiam, et cum eo Isaiam de filiis Merari, fratresque ejus, et filios ejus viginti :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶ֨ת־חֲשַׁבְיָ֔ה וְאִתּ֥וֹ יְשַֽׁעְיָ֖ה מִבְּנֵ֣י מְרָרִ֑י אֶחָ֥יו וּבְנֵיהֶ֖ם עֶשְׂרִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And Hasabias, and with him Isaias of the sons of Merari, and his brethren, and his sons twenty.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Hasabian ja Jesaian hänen kanssansa, Merarin pojista, hänen veljensä ja heidän poikainsa kanssa kaksikymmentä;
verses.king_james: And Hashabiah, and with him Jeshaiah of the sons of Merari, his brethren and their sons, twenty;

verses.latin_vulgate: et de Nathinæis, quos dederat David et principes ad ministeria Levitarum, Nathinæos ducentos viginti : omnes hi suis nominibus vocabantur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִן־הַנְּתִינִ֗ים שֶׁנָּתַ֨ן דָּוִ֤יד וְהַשָּׂרִים֙ לַעֲבֹדַ֣ת הַלְוִיִּ֔ם נְתִינִ֖ים מָאתַ֣יִם וְעֶשְׂרִ֑ים כֻּלָּ֖ם נִקְּב֥וּ בְשֵׁמֽוֹת׃
verses.douay_rheims: And of the Nathinites, whom David, and the princes gave for the service of the Levites, Nathinites two hundred and twenty: all these were called by their names.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja Netinimeistä, jotka David ja päämiehet olivat panneet Leviläisiä palvelemaan, kaksisataa ja kaksikymmentä Netinimiä; kaikki nimeltänsä nimitetyt.
verses.king_james: Also of the Nethinims, whom David and the princes had appointed for the service of the Levites, two hundred and twenty Nethinims: all of them were expressed by name.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et prædicavi ibi jejunium juxta fluvium Ahava, ut affligeremur coram Domino Deo nostro, et peteremus ab eo viam rectam nobis et filiis nostris, universæque substantiæ nostræ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶקְרָ֨א שָׁ֥ם צוֹם֙ עַל־הַנָּהָ֣ר אַהֲוָ֔א לְהִתְעַנּ֖וֹת לִפְנֵ֣י אֱלֹהֵ֑ינוּ לְבַקֵּ֤שׁ מִמֶּ֙נּוּ֙ דֶּ֣רֶךְ יְשָׁרָ֔ה לָ֥נוּ וּלְטַפֵּ֖נוּ וּלְכׇל־רְכוּשֵֽׁנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I proclaimed there a fast by the river Ahava, that we might afflict ourselves before the Lord our God, and might ask of him a right way for us and for our children, and for all our substance.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä kuulutin siellä paaston Ahavan virran tykönä, nöyryyttääksemme mieltämme Jumalamme edessä, ja kysyäksemme häneltä oikiaa tietä meille ja meidän lapsillemme ja kaikille meidän kaluillemme.
verses.king_james: Then I proclaimed a fast there, at the river of Ahava, that we might afflict ourselves before our God, to seek of him a right way for us, and for our little ones, and for all our substance.

verses.latin_vulgate: Erubui enim petere a rege auxilium et equites, qui defenderent nos ab inimico in via : quia dixeramus regi : Manus Dei nostri est super omnes qui quærunt eum in bonitate : et imperium ejus, et fortitudo ejus, et furor, super omnes qui derelinquunt eum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י בֹ֗שְׁתִּי לִשְׁא֤וֹל מִן־הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ חַ֣יִל וּפָרָשִׁ֔ים לְעׇזְרֵ֥נוּ מֵאוֹיֵ֖ב בַּדָּ֑רֶךְ כִּֽי־אָמַ֨רְנוּ לַמֶּ֜לֶךְ לֵאמֹ֗ר יַד־אֱלֹהֵ֤ינוּ עַל־כׇּל־מְבַקְשָׁיו֙ לְטוֹבָ֔ה וְעֻזּ֣וֹ וְאַפּ֔וֹ עַ֖ל כׇּל־עֹזְבָֽיו׃
verses.douay_rheims: For I was ashamed to ask the king for aid and for horsemen, to defend us from the enemy in the way: because we had said to the king: The hand of our God is upon all them that seek him in goodness: and his power and strength, and wrath upon all them that forsake him.
verses.finnish_biblia: Sillä en minä rohjennut anoa kuninkaalta sotaväkeä ja huovia varjelemaan meitä tiellä vihollisilta; sillä me olimme sanoneet kuninkaalle, että meidän Jumalamme käsi on hyväksi kaikkein ylitse, jotka häntä etsivät; mutta hänen väkevyytensä ja vihansa on kaikkein niiden päällä, jotka hänen hylkäävät.
verses.king_james: For I was ashamed to require of the king a band of soldiers and horsemen to help us against the enemy in the way: because we had spoken unto the king, saying, The hand of our God is upon all them for good that seek him; but his power and his wrath is against all them that forsake him.

verses.latin_vulgate: Jejunavimus autem, et rogavimus Deum nostrum per hoc : et evenit nobis prospere.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנָּצ֛וּמָה וַנְּבַקְשָׁ֥ה מֵאֱלֹהֵ֖ינוּ עַל־זֹ֑את וַיֵּעָתֵ֖ר לָֽנוּ׃
verses.douay_rheims: And we fasted, and besought our God for this: and it fell out prosperously unto us.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin me paastosimme ja rukoilimme meidän Jumalaamme sen edestä; ja hän kuuli meitä.
verses.king_james: So we fasted and besought our God for this: and he was intreated of us.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et separavi de principibus sacerdotum duodecim, Sarabiam, et Hasabiam, et cum eis de fratribus eorum decem :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאַבְדִּ֛ילָה מִשָּׂרֵ֥י הַכֹּהֲנִ֖ים שְׁנֵ֣ים עָשָׂ֑ר לְשֵׁרֵֽבְיָ֣ה חֲשַׁבְיָ֔ה וְעִמָּהֶ֥ם מֵאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם עֲשָׂרָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I separated twelve of the chief of the priests, Sarabias, and Hasabias, and with them ten of their brethren,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä valitsin ylimmäisistä papeista kaksitoistakymmentä: Serebian ja Hasabian, ja kymmenen heidän veljistänsä heidän kanssansa;
verses.king_james: Then I separated twelve of the chief of the priests, Sherebiah, Hashabiah, and ten of their brethren with them,

verses.latin_vulgate: appendique eis argentum et aurum, et vasa consecrata domus Dei nostri, quæ obtulerat rex et consiliatores ejus, et principes ejus, universusque Israël eorum qui inventi fuerant :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: (ואשקולה) [וָאֶשְׁקֳלָ֣ה] לָהֶ֔ם אֶת־הַכֶּ֥סֶף וְאֶת־הַזָּהָ֖ב וְאֶת־הַכֵּלִ֑ים תְּרוּמַ֣ת בֵּית־אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ הַהֵרִ֙ימוּ֙ הַמֶּ֙לֶךְ֙ וְיֹעֲצָ֣יו וְשָׂרָ֔יו וְכׇל־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל הַנִּמְצָאִֽים׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I weighed unto them the silver and gold, and the vessels consecrated for the house of our God, which the king and his counsellors, and his princes, and all Israel, that were found had offered.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä punnitsin heille hopian ja kullan, ja ylennysastiat meidän Jumalamme huoneesen, mitkä kuningas ja hänen neuvonantajansa ja päämiehensä, ja koko Israel, joka saapuvilla oli, olivat antaneet ylennykseksi.
verses.king_james: And weighed unto them the silver, and the gold, and the vessels, even the offering of the house of our God, which the king, and his counsellors, and his lords, and all Israel there present, had offered:

verses.latin_vulgate: et appendi in manibus eorum argenti talenta sexcenta quinquaginta, et vasa argentea centum, auri centum talenta :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֶשְׁקְלָ֨ה עַל־יָדָ֜ם כֶּ֗סֶף כִּכָּרִים֙ שֵֽׁשׁ־מֵא֣וֹת וַחֲמִשִּׁ֔ים וּכְלֵי־כֶ֥סֶף מֵאָ֖ה לְכִכָּרִ֑ים זָהָ֖ב מֵאָ֥ה כִכָּֽר׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I weighed to their hands six hundred and fifty talents of silver, and a hundred vessels of silver, and a hundred talents of gold,
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja punnitsin heidän käteensä hopiaa kuusisataa ja viisikymmentä leiviskää, ja hopia- astioita sata leiviskää, ja sata leiviskää kultaa,
verses.king_james: I even weighed unto their hand six hundred and fifty talents of silver, and silver vessels an hundred talents, and of gold an hundred talents;

verses.latin_vulgate: et crateres aureos viginti, qui habebant solidos millenos, et vasa æris fulgentis optimi duo, pulchra ut aurum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּכְפֹרֵ֤י זָהָב֙ עֶשְׂרִ֔ים לַאֲדַרְכֹנִ֖ים אָ֑לֶף וּכְלֵ֨י נְחֹ֜שֶׁת מֻצְהָ֤ב טוֹבָה֙ שְׁנַ֔יִם חֲמוּדֹ֖ת כַּזָּהָֽב׃
verses.douay_rheims: And twenty cups of gold, of a thousand solids, and two vessels of the best shining brass, beautiful as gold.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja kaksikymmentä kultaista maljaa, jotka painoivat tuhannen kultapenninkiä, ja kaksi kallista vaskiastiaa, niin kirkasta kuin kulta.
verses.king_james: Also twenty basons of gold, of a thousand drams; and two vessels of fine copper, precious as gold.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dixi eis : Vos sancti Domini, et vasa sancta, et argentum et aurum, quod sponte oblatum est Domino Deo patrum nostrorum :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וָאֹמְרָ֣ה אֲלֵהֶ֗ם אַתֶּ֥ם קֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ לַיהֹוָ֔ה וְהַכֵּלִ֖ים קֹ֑דֶשׁ וְהַכֶּ֤סֶף וְהַזָּהָב֙ נְדָבָ֔ה לַיהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י אֲבֹתֵיכֶֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And I said to them: You are the holy ones of the Lord, and the vessels are holy, and the silver and gold, that is freely offered to the Lord the God of our fathers.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja minä sanoin heille: te olette pyhät Herralle, niin myös ovat astiat pyhät, ja kulta ja hopia on hyvällä mielellä annettu Herralle isäinne Jumalalle.
verses.king_james: And I said unto them, Ye are holy unto the Lord; the vessels are holy also; and the silver and the gold are a freewill offering unto the Lord God of your fathers.

verses.latin_vulgate: vigilate et custodite, donec appendatis coram principibus sacerdotum, et Levitarum, et ducibus familiarum Israël in Jerusalem, in thesaurum domus Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁקְד֣וּ וְשִׁמְר֗וּ עַֽד־תִּשְׁקְל֡וּ לִפְנֵי֩ שָׂרֵ֨י הַכֹּהֲנִ֧ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֛ם וְשָׂרֵֽי־הָאָב֥וֹת לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בִּירוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם הַלִּשְׁכ֖וֹת בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.douay_rheims: Watch ye and keep them, till you deliver them by weight before the chief of the priests, and of the Levites, and the heads of the families of Israel in Jerusalem, into the treasure of the house of the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Valvokaat siis ja pitäkäät ne niinkauvan tallella, että te ne jälleen punnitsette ulos pappein ja Leviläisten, päämiesten ja Israelin ylimmäisten isäin edessä, Jerusalemissa, Herran huoneen arkkuihin.
verses.king_james: Watch ye, and keep them, until ye weigh them before the chief of the priests and the Levites, and chief of the fathers of Israel, at Jerusalem, in the chambers of the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Susceperunt autem sacerdotes et Levitæ pondus argenti, et auri, et vasorum, ut deferrent Jerusalem in domum Dei nostri.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְקִבְּלוּ֙ הַכֹּהֲנִ֣ים וְהַלְוִיִּ֔ם מִשְׁקַ֛ל הַכֶּ֥סֶף וְהַזָּהָ֖ב וְהַכֵּלִ֑ים לְהָבִ֥יא לִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם לְבֵ֥ית אֱלֹהֵֽינוּ׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: And the priests and the Levites received the weight of the silver and gold, and the vessels, to carry them to Jerusalem to the house of our God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Niin papit ja Leviläiset ottivat vastaan punnitun hopian ja kullan ja astiat, viedäksensä Jerusalemiin Jumalamme huoneeseen.
verses.king_james: So took the priests and the Levites the weight of the silver, and the gold, and the vessels, to bring them to Jerusalem unto the house of our God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Promovimus ergo a flumine Ahava duodecimo die mensis primi ut pergeremus Jerusalem : et manus Dei nostri fuit super nos, et liberavit nos de manu inimici et insidiatoris in via.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽנִּסְּעָ֞ה מִנְּהַ֣ר אַֽהֲוָ֗א בִּשְׁנֵ֤ים עָשָׂר֙ לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֔וֹן לָלֶ֖כֶת יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וְיַד־אֱלֹהֵ֙ינוּ֙ הָיְתָ֣ה עָלֵ֔ינוּ וַיַּ֨צִּילֵ֔נוּ מִכַּ֥ף אוֹיֵ֛ב וְאוֹרֵ֖ב עַל־הַדָּֽרֶךְ׃
verses.douay_rheims: Then we set forward from the river Ahava on the twelfth day of the first month to go to Jerusalem: and the hand of our God was upon us, and delivered us from the hand of the enemy, and of such as lay in wait by the way.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja me läksimme Ahavan virran tyköä, toisena päivänä toistakymmentä ensimäistä kuuta, menemään Jerusalemiin. Ja meidän Jumalamme käsi oli meidän päällämme, joka meitä pelasti vihollistemme käsistä ja väijymisestä tiellä.
verses.king_james: Then we departed from the river of Ahava on the twelfth day of the first month, to go unto Jerusalem: and the hand of our God was upon us, and he delivered us from the hand of the enemy, and of such as lay in wait by the way.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et venimus Jerusalem, et mansimus ibi tribus diebus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַנָּב֖וֹא יְרוּשָׁלָ֑͏ִם וַנֵּ֥שֶׁב שָׁ֖ם יָמִ֥ים שְׁלֹשָֽׁה׃
verses.douay_rheims: And we came to Jerusalem, and we stayed there three days.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja me tulimme Jerusalemiin ja oleskelimme siellä kolme päivää.
verses.king_james: And we came to Jerusalem, and abode there three days.

verses.latin_vulgate: Die autem quarta appensum est argentum, et aurum, et vasa in domo Dei nostri per manum Meremoth filii Uriæ sacerdotis, et cum eo Eleazar filius Phinees, cumque eis Jozabed filius Josue, et Noadaia filius Bennoi Levitæ,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבַיּ֣וֹם הָרְבִיעִ֡י נִשְׁקַ֣ל הַכֶּ֩סֶף֩ וְהַזָּהָ֨ב וְהַכֵּלִ֜ים בְּבֵ֣ית אֱלֹהֵ֗ינוּ עַ֠ל יַד־מְרֵמ֤וֹת בֶּן־אֽוּרִיָּה֙ הַכֹּהֵ֔ן וְעִמּ֖וֹ אֶלְעָזָ֣ר בֶּן־פִּֽינְחָ֑ס וְעִמָּהֶ֞ם יוֹזָבָ֧ד בֶּן־יֵשׁ֛וּעַ וְנֽוֹעַדְיָ֥ה בֶן־בִּנּ֖וּי הַלְוִיִּֽם׃
verses.douay_rheims: And on the fourth day the silver and the gold, and the vessels were weighed in the house of our God by the hand of Meremoth the son of Urias the priest, and with him was Eleazar the son of Phinees, and with them Jozabad the son of Josue, and Noadaia the son of Benoi, Levites.
verses.finnish_biblia: Mutta neljäntenä päivänä punnittiin hopia ja kulta, ja astiat meidän Jumalamme huoneesen, papin Urian pojan Meremotin käden alla, ja hänen kanssansa oli Eleatsar Pinehaan poika ja heidän kanssansa Josabad Jesuan poika ja Noadia Binnuin poika, Leviläiset.
verses.king_james: Now on the fourth day was the silver and the gold and the vessels weighed in the house of our God by the hand of Meremoth the son of Uriah the priest; and with him was Eleazar the son of Phinehas; and with them was Jozabad the son of Jeshua, and Noadiah the son of Binnui, Levites;

verses.latin_vulgate: juxta numerum et pondus omnium : descriptumque est omne pondus in tempore illo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּמִסְפָּ֥ר בְּמִשְׁקָ֖ל לַכֹּ֑ל וַיִּכָּתֵ֥ב כׇּֽל־הַמִּשְׁקָ֖ל בָּעֵ֥ת הַהִֽיא׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: According to the number and weight of everything: and all the weight was written at that time.
verses.finnish_biblia: Jokaisen luvun ja painon jälkeen; ja kaikki se paino kirjoitettiin siihen aikaan.
verses.king_james: By number and by weight of every one: and all the weight was written at that time.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et qui venerant de captivitate filii transmigrationis, obtulerunt holocautomata Deo Israël, vitulos duodecim pro omni populo Israël, arietes nonaginta sex, agnos septuaginta septem, hircos pro peccato duodecim : omnia in holocaustum Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַ֠בָּאִ֠ים מֵֽהַשְּׁבִ֨י בְנֵֽי־הַגּוֹלָ֜ה הִקְרִ֥יבוּ עֹל֣וֹת ׀ לֵאלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל פָּרִ֨ים שְׁנֵים־עָשָׂ֤ר עַל־כׇּל־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ אֵילִ֣ים ׀ תִּשְׁעִ֣ים וְשִׁשָּׁ֗ה כְּבָשִׂים֙ שִׁבְעִ֣ים וְשִׁבְעָ֔ה צְפִירֵ֥י חַטָּ֖את שְׁנֵ֣ים עָשָׂ֑ר הַכֹּ֖ל עוֹלָ֥ה לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.douay_rheims: Moreover the children of them that had been carried away that were come out of the captivity, offered holocausts to the God of Israel, twelve calves for all the people of Israel, ninety-six rams, seventy-seven lambs, and twelve he goats for sin: all for a holocaust to the Lord.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja vankeuden lapset, jotka olivat tulleet vankeudesta, uhrasivat Israelin Jumalalle polttouhria, kaksitoistakymmentä mullia, koko Israelin edestä, yhdeksänkymmentä ja kuusi oinasta, seitsemänkahdeksattakymmentä karitsaa, kaksitoistakymmentä kaurista syntiuhriksi, kaikki tyynni polttouhriksi Herralle.
verses.king_james: Also the children of those that had been carried away, which were come out of the captivity, offered burnt offerings unto the God of Israel, twelve bullocks for all Israel, ninety and six rams, seventy and seven lambs, twelve he goats for a sin offering: all this was a burnt offering unto the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dederunt autem edicta regis satrapis qui erant de conspectu regis, et ducibus trans flumen, et elevaverunt populum et domum Dei.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַֽיִּתְּנ֣וּ ׀ אֶת־דָּתֵ֣י הַמֶּ֗לֶךְ לַאֲחַשְׁדַּרְפְּנֵי֙ הַמֶּ֔לֶךְ וּפַחֲו֖וֹת עֵ֣בֶר הַנָּהָ֑ר וְנִשְּׂא֥וּ אֶת־הָעָ֖ם וְאֶת־בֵּ֥ית הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃ {ס}
verses.douay_rheims: And they gave the king's edicts to the lords that were from the king's court, and the governors beyond the river, and they furthered the people and the house of God.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ja he antoivat kuninkaan kirjat ja käskyn kuninkaan maaherroille ja päämiehille tällä puolella virtaa, ja korottivat kansan ja Jumalan huoneen.
verses.king_james: And they delivered the king’s commissions unto the king’s lieutenants, and to the governors on this side the river: and they furthered the people, and the house of God.
